title: Vs baseline
frozenLabel: The lift our intelligence adds — vs the same engine without it (plan comparison).
historicalLabel: Vs your actual recorded outcomes (execution comparison) — representative seed for now.
frozenHint: Plan comparison: the live engine's plan vs the same engine with learning + stability off (not your manual process). Execution-only metrics like OEE don't apply here.
historicalHint: Execution comparison: this version's recorded outcomes vs your historical data (representative seed until your historian is connected).
emptyHint: This computes the moment a historian feeds recorded outcomes for this scope.
noLift: No lift yet — learning hasn't accrued for this plan.
